author: lOrm
content:
Already resolved by crosslink #383 (commit f626c7f3 — single MODIFIERS table).

Verified src/modes/fragments.rs:
- AGENCY_FRAGMENTS (line 43), QUALITY_FRAGMENTS (59), SCOPE_FRAGMENTS (75), and MODIFIERS (106) are single-source tables paired (variant -> embedded fragment).
- The four accessors (agency_fragment, quality_fragment, scope_fragment, modifier_fragment at lines 160-205) are now three-line linear-scan lookups, not match-on-enum-to-const blocks.
- Tests every_modifier_variant_appears_in_table_exactly_once and every_axis_variant_appears_in_its_table_exactly_once enforce the single-source invariant.

Adding a new modifier is one MODIFIERS entry + one enum variant — the mandated refactor outcome. Closing as already-fixed.
